sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the established template, self-audited before commit. B2 upgrade of the feelings system: register-rich expression bank (raffoler de, avoir un faible pour, être atterré/navré/indigné, ne pas en revenir, déplorer) + the full de + infinitif (présent/passé) vs que + subjonctif (présent/passé) system + impersonal judgments (il est inadmissible que…). Spirals from b1.1/unit-02-feelings. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego B2 (Hachette), Dossier 2 'Privé' (exprimer des sentiments, p.31; thème: amour, famille). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
